title: Does anyone know any information about this version of the EVA theatrical DVD
display_title: Does anyone know any information about this version of the EVA theatrical DVD
wikitext:
[]: Does anyone know any information about this version of the EVA theatrical DVD?             Quote Post by mnb666 » Thu Mar 30, 2023 1:19 am There is very little information about this version on the internet, but according to the KIBA number it seems that this version did exist, and the appearance of this version is obviously different from the KIBA-105~6 / GDVD-008~9 version KIBA-105~6 / GDVD-008~9 version (This version is more common)

[]: Re: Does anyone know any information about this version of the EVA theatrical DVD?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Mar 30, 2023 3:34 am Don't know anything, but owning Rebirth would be awesome. I know it's on the big Japanese bluray set.

[]: Re: Does anyone know any information about this version of the EVA theatrical DVD?             Quote Post by mnb666 » Thu Mar 30, 2023 6:16 am kuribo-04 wrote: Don't know anything, but owning Rebirth would be awesome. I know it's on the big Japanese bluray set.

[]: Re: Does anyone know any information about this version of the EVA theatrical DVD?             Quote Post by svenge » Sat Apr 01, 2023 7:43 am KIBA-10105 is merely the rental counterpart to the "Death[True]² & Rebirth" disc found in the retail "Theatrical Edition" 2-DVD set from 1999 (i.e. KIBA-105/6). The on-disc contents are identical as well, so other than the standard DVD-sized packaging and relatively rare cover art from Masayuki there's nothing terribly interesting about the rental release in its own right. Also note that EoE had a corresponding rental DVD as well (KIBA-10106). On a side note, Rebirth is indeed found on Disc 6 of the Japanese Blu-ray sets (i.e. KIXA-90501 and KIXA-870). Unfortunately it's not available on any of the international Blu-ray box set releases, though.

[]: Re: Does anyone know any information about this version of the EVA theatrical DVD?             Quote Post by mnb666 » Sun Apr 02, 2023 7:34 am svenge wrote: KIBA-10105 is merely the rental counterpart to the "Death[True]² & Rebirth" disc found in the retail "Theatrical Edition" 2-DVD set from 1999 (i.e. KIBA-105/6). The on-disc contents are identical as well, so other than the standard DVD-sized packaging and relatively rare cover art from Masayuki there's nothing terribly interesting about the rental release in its own right. Also note that EoE had a corresponding rental DVD as well (KIBA-10106). On a side note, Rebirth is indeed found on Disc 6 of the Japanese Blu-ray sets (i.e. KIXA-90501 and KIXA-870). Unfortunately it's not available on any of the international Blu-ray box set releases, though.
